name: Corn-Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup dry corn bread or corn tortillas, crumbled
Salt or salt substitute, to taste
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
Fill a large kettle at least half full and bring water to rolling boil. Slice off the top 'lid' from each pepper and scrape out the insides. Plunge shells into water, parboil for 2 minutes, then remove with care and invert on towels, draining.
In a skillet, sauté onions and garlic until soft. Cool slightly and combine with all other stuffing ingredients and seasonings. Stuff peppers with mixture and place in baking pan. Bake about 40 minutes covered and 10 minutes uncovered at 375 degrees, basting often with vegetable broth.
